We provide financial insight and strategic insight that empower leaders to make confident, data-driven decisions. Tagline: We enable entrepreneurs and creators to increase profits and turn revenue into financial security and generational wealth.Site layout: Branding & ColorsPrimary background color: Navy #0B1A2B (applied across the full site background).Accent color (headlines, buttons): Gold #C9A24B.Text: White (#FFFFFF) for body and section copy.Logo: Gold tree with “Dream of Legacy Consulting” text — appears top center and in footer.2. Homepage LayoutTop Navigation (sticky, white text):Sections: About UsOur ApproachOur ServicesWhy Fractional CFOElevate Your Wealth (Blog)Schedule a Consultation (button → Calendly link)Hero Section:Headline: Fractional CFO and Strategic Consulting Services (in bright gold, large, centered).Sub-tagline (white, justified):We provide business leaders with the clarity, confidence, and strategic insight needed to make sound financial decisions while scaling. Through Fractional CFO and Consulting Services, we ensure growth is sustainable—grounded in data, strategy, and financial integrity.CTA button (gold background, navy text): “Schedule a Consultation.”3.
